# ⚠️ DO NOT EDIT ANYTHING IN THIS DIRECTORY

This directory is managed by git subtree and tracks https://github.com/github/spec-kit

**Never edit files here directly.** Changes will be lost on the next upstream pull.

To pull a new upstream version:
  git subtree pull --prefix upstream https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git main --squash

To check what changed upstream before pulling:
  git diff HEAD upstream/

Last synced: (update this manually when you pull)
Upstream commit: (update this manually when you pull)
